productDisplayName: Ice Watch Women Flower White Watch
description: Case style: Round stainless steel case for durability, with a see through middle (plastic case)Dial style: Silver dial analog watch with silver, white and orange hands, branding under the 12 hour markFeatures: Numbered and rotating bezel, screw to reset timeStrap style: Cream, floral textured, glossy, leather strap with a tang clasp closure and holes to cutomise fitWater resistant:  Upto 5 ATM, allowing you to use it even when showeringWarranty: 2 Year local warranty against defects in material and workmanship
